name: Zigbee mmWave Sensor (Ceiling Mounted)

description.consumer:
A room that knows when it's occupied.

The Ceiling mmWave Sensor watches the whole room — not a narrow cone. It detects presence, not just motion, so every automation responds to whether someone is actually there. Not whether they waved.
description.technical:
A ceiling-mounted, mains-powered Zigbee mmWave presence sensor designed for accurate occupancy detection across a full room. Detects micro-movements for continuous presence sensing — not just initial motion.

Ideal for lighting control, HVAC triggers, and occupancy-based automation in residential and commercial spaces. Ceiling mount provides optimal coverage.

Key Specifications
- Protocol: Zigbee 3.0
- Detection: mmWave radar (motion + presence)
- Power: Mains powered
- Mounting: Ceiling mount

⚠ Does not control electrical loads. Provides presence/motion data for automation triggers.

specs.summary: Wireless Connection: Zigbee | Working Voltage: AC 100–250V | Working Current: ≤70mA | Working Temperature: -20°C to +70°C | Detection Distance: 0.3–9m (default 6m) | Sensitivity: 0–9 (default 7) | Target Detection Confirmation Time: 0–10s | Target Disappearance Delay Time: 0.5s–25 min (min. 15s recommended) | Light Sensing Range: 0–2000 Lux | Installation: Ceiling Mounted
specs.compatibility: Compatible Zigbee gateways and automation platforms

limitations: Does not control electrical loads. Provides presence/motion signals for automation.
dependencies: Mains wiring at ceiling mount point. Zigbee coordinator or hub.
